recommendations.title: Desperation
recommendations.overview: When a sheriff arrests a writer, a family, a couple, and a hitchiker and throws them in a jail cell in the deserted town of Desperation, they must fight for their lives.

recommendations.title: Psycho IV: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: When he hears talk radio host Fran Ambrose discussing the topic of matricide, Norman calls in under a false name to tell his story.

recommendations.title: Riding the Bullet

recommendations.title: Sleepwalkers
recommendations.overview: Charles Brady and his mother, Mary, are the last of a dying breed whose needs are not of this world.  They are Sleepwalkers - able to stay alive only by feeding on the life-force of the innocent, but destined to roam the earth, avoiding discovery whi

recommendations.title: Nightmare Cinema
recommendations.overview: A series of down-on-their-luck individuals enter the decrepit and spine-chilling Rialto theater, only to have their deepest and darkest fears brought to life on the silver screen by The Projectionist – a mysterious, ghostly figure who holds the night
recommendations.director: Ryuhei Kitamura, Alejandro Brugués, Mick Garris, David Slade, Joe Dante

recommendations.title: Trigun: Badlands Rumble

recommendations.title: Alien
recommendations.overview: During its return to the earth, commercial spaceship Nostromo intercepts a distress signal from a distant planet. When a three-member team of the crew discovers a chamber containing thousands of eggs on the planet, a creature inside one of the eggs a

recommendations.title: For a Few Dollars More
recommendations.overview: Two bounty hunters both pursue the brutal and sadistic bandit, El Indio, who has a large bounty on his head.

recommendations.title: Critters
recommendations.overview: Carnivorous aliens arrive unannounced at a Kansas family farm; two intergalactic bounty hunters soon follow, determined to blow them off the planet.

recommendations.title: Vampire Hunter D: Bloodlust
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Horror, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: D, a legendary dhampir competes with a motley family of bounty hunters to track down Charlotte Elbourne, a young woman who has seemingly been abducted by vampire nobleman Meier Link.
